top_signals.title: Dollar-Denominated EM Assets Outperforming: UBS' Khan
top_signals.summary: Shamaila Khan, UBS Asset Management Head of Global EM and APAC Fixed Income, speaks with Bloomberg TV about the strong opportunities in dollar-denominated emerging market assets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers eye extra benefits for child-rearing households
top_signals.summary: A bipartisan group of lawmakers is looking into increasing take-home pay for low- and middle-income workers by adjusting the amount of benefits according to income.
